com.jsyn.util

Class AutoCorrelator

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.jsyn.util.AutoCorrelator
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    SignalCorrelator

    public class AutoCorrelator
extends java.lang.Object
implements SignalCorrelator
    Calculate period of a repeated waveform in an array. This algorithm is based on a normalized auto-correlation function as dewscribed in: "A Smarter Way to Find Pitch" by Philip McLeod and Geoff Wyvill
    Author:
    (C) 2004 Mobileer, PROPRIETARY and CONFIDENTIAL

        Description copied from interface: SignalCorrelator

      • addSample

        public boolean addSample(double value)
        Description copied from interface: SignalCorrelator
        Add a sample to be analyzed. The samples will generally be held in a circular buffer.
        Specified by:
        addSample in interface SignalCorrelator
        Returns:
        true if a new period value has been generated

      • getPeriod

        public double getPeriod()
        Specified by:
        getPeriod in interface SignalCorrelator
        Returns:
        the estimated period of the waveform in samples

      • getConfidence

        public double getConfidence()
        Description copied from interface: SignalCorrelator
        Measure of how confident the analyzer is of the last result.
        Specified by:
        getConfidence in interface SignalCorrelator
        Returns:
        quality of the estimate between 0.0 and 1.0
